case_title: TRUONG, CHRISTINA VS EASTON MORTGAGE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY TRUONG, CHRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT EASTON MORTGAGE CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
